title: crotalaria pilosiflora
intro: Crotalaria pilosiflora, also known as the hairy-flowered crotalaria, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria pilosiflora include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and various skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make infusions and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
